extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon defended 39-second GC lead through final 10.1km ITT, holding off THOMAS Geraint by 17 seconds after GANNA Filippo shattered Cancellara's course record.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint's 28-second gap to GANNA suggests rapid post-injury form return, making him dangerous in stage races with final ITTs.
MAJKA Rafał lost 23 seconds to THOMAS despite decent first split, revealing inability to maintain TT power over 10km efforts.
YATES Simon averaged 50kph on TT bike despite being pure climber, suggesting aero position improvements change GC ITT threat assessment.

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: destroyed Cancellara's 2016 course record by 26 seconds (11:08 to 10:42), establishing new benchmark power output
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: fourth-fastest TT performance while targeting GC, within 28 seconds of GANNA, signals return to peak form
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: defended GC by averaging 50kph despite climber profile, held 17-second margin over THOMAS after starting 39 seconds ahead
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: faded after strong first split, lost podium spot to THOMAS, exposed weakness in sustained 10km TT efforts
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: moved from sixth to fourth on GC, capitalizing on MAJKA's collapse without exceptional TT performance
